original_statement: which manufacturer(s) is/are listed the least on this chart?
mutated_statement: which entity(ies) is/are listed the least and the most on this chart?
mutation_analysis: Term generalization + Requirement addition: 'manufacturer(s)' generalized to 'entity(ies)' (manufacturer(s)→entity(ies)) | Added opposite metric, now asking for both least- and most-listed instead of only least-listed (listed the least → listed the least and the most)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确识别并满足新增/泛化要求
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与agent的simple_query思路可识别关键事实：(1) agent在simple_query的thought中列出并计数各厂商出现次数，明确写出“New flyer 2次、Gillig 2次、Van Hool 11次”；(2) judge_thought重复该计数并将结果判为[Correct]，指出最少为New Flyer和Gillig，最多为Van Hool。agent的具体表现是直接接受变异问题中对术语的泛化（manufacturer→entity）并满足新增的度量要求（同时给出least与most），通过数据计数推导出明确结论，未表现出对指令矛盾的疑虑或回避。由此归类为“正确识别并满足新增/泛化要求”——因为此情形并不存在实际矛盾，agent既未回避也未修正问题，而是按扩展后的需求准确执行并给出合理解释与答案。
